title: tessaria absinthioides var. ambigua
intro: Tessaria absinthioides var. ambigua, also known as the Ambiguous Tessaria, is a flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Tessaria absinthioides var. ambigua include its ability to aid in the relief of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate digestive problems. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional remedies.
